title: Gateway Gun Super
description: Modpack that features the Gateway Gun mod: Minecraft's best portal gun mod
body:
# Modpack
This modpack is a good way to get into Minecraft's best portal gun mod with decent visuals not dependent on shaders. 
# More Elaborate Description
For those of you who don't know what a portal gun is, it's a GUN that shoots PORTALS. This modpack features a great implementation of the PORTAL GUN from Valve's famed PORTAL SERIES. This modpack also adds SOLID VISUALS with client-side mods. Does this completely unnecessary paragraph appease moderation? I was more elaborate with describing things. Now the playerbase knows what a portal gun is and that the decent visuals were indeed added with mods. 
# YouTube Short this is my YouTube Short
Here's my YouTube short: 
[https://www.youtube.com/shorts/llSL5IbmbHo](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/llSL5IbmbHo)

if youre here because you saw the phoenix sc video and wanted to play portal in minecraft... hi
